name: kisaes-cpa-skills
description: Kisaes CPA Skills marketplace — Vibe CPA Skills pack and related plugins for licensed tax practitioners.

plugins.name: vibe-cpa-pack
plugins.description: 46 skills covering federal research, prediction, return summary, planning, state research (50 + DC), tax compliance utilities, S-corp / Schedule C strategy catalogs, a 24-election library, a 117-strategy planning library, AICPA Code of Professional Conduct + SSARS + SAS + SSAE/SOC + SQMS quality management, engagement-letter library across 13 engagement types, FASB ASC research (general + ASC 740 + ASC 606/842), and engagement-file workpaper templates (PBC / tickmark / lead-sheet / indexing + audit / review / compilation variants per AU-C §230 / AR-C §60.A24 / AT-C §105.A57). Every answer ends with a follow-up-routing prompt offering memo / open-point / plan / workpaper / resolution / return handoffs. Strict citation discipline; tax-position / professional-conduct / GAAP authority domains.
